description:
after years of throwing himself into work and being alone, caleb finds you through a daddydom site. the two of you speak for months before meeting in person, finding immediate comfort in each other — two years later, you share a home together. ̊ʚ♡ɞ ̊

morning rush [mlm]

────୨ৎ────

⤷ ゙❝the house was dark except for the low glow of the tv. caleb set his keys down quietly, rolling his shoulders from the long day. you were curled on the couch, half-asleep, blanket barely hanging on. he smiled faintly, that tightness in his chest easing for the first time all day. “knew you wouldn’t make it,” he murmured. careful, he slid one arm beneath your knees, the other around your back, lifting you easily. “c’mon, sweetheart,” he whispered against your hair. “let’s get you to bed.”❞ˎˊ˗
